jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Join our elite engineering team. We are building the next generation of fintech solutions for East Africa. Requirements: 5+ years experience with React/Node.js, strong problem solving skills, and a passion for clean code.

applicationProcess.instructions: Please submit your CV and portfolio through our portal.

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: We are looking for a visionary designer to lead our mobile app redesign. You will work closely with product managers and engineers to create a world-class user experience.

applicationProcess.instructions: Send your portfolio to our HR telegram handle.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Drive our brand presence in East Africa. You will be responsible for digital marketing, brand strategy, and community engagement.

applicationProcess.instructions: Email your CV with the subject "Marketing Manager Application".

jobs.title: Civil Engineer
jobs.description: Oversee construction projects in the Amhara region. Must have experience with large-scale infrastructure.

applicationProcess.instructions: Call our office during business hours to schedule an interview.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze market trends and provide actionable insights for our clients in the Tigray region.

applicationProcess.instructions: Drop off your CV at our reception desk.

jobs.title: Sales Representative
jobs.description: Represent our agricultural exports in the Gondar area. Strong communication skills required.

applicationProcess.instructions: Apply via our official telegram bot.

jobs.title: Customer Service Officer II
jobs.description: We are looking for a dedicated Customer Service Officer II for our Bahir Dar branch. The ideal candidate will have at least 2 years of experience in the banking sector and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction.

applicationProcess.instructions: Apply through our official career portal.

jobs.title: Customer Service Officer II
jobs.description: Join Awash Bank as a Customer Service Officer II in Hawassa. You will be responsible for providing excellent service to our clients and handling various banking transactions.

applicationProcess.instructions: Send your CV and cover letter to our recruitment email.

jobs.title: Customer Service Officer II
jobs.description: Bunna Bank is seeking a Customer Service Officer II for our headquarters in Addis Ababa. Candidates should have a proven track record in customer relations within a banking environment.

applicationProcess.instructions: Apply via our HR telegram bot.
